Package org.springdoc.core.properties

Class SpringDocConfigProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.properties.SpringDocConfigProperties
@Lazy(false) @Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false) @ConfigurationProperties(prefix="springdoc") @ConditionalOnProperty(name="springdoc.api-docs.enabled", matchIfMissing=true) @ConditionalOnBean(SpringDocConfiguration.class) @Role(2) public class SpringDocConfigProperties extends Object
The type Spring doc config properties.
Author:
bnasslahsen
